PowerShell($flutter = \(Get-Command flutter -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($flutter\) { Write-Output "FLUTTER FOUND: $\($flutter.Source\)"; flutter --version } else { Write-Output "FLUTTER NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell($dart = \(Get-Command dart -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($dart\) { Write-Output "DART FOUND: $\($dart.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "DART NOT FOUND" }; Write-Output "---DIRECTORY CONTENTS---"; Get-ChildItem -Force "C:\\Users\\Mancuso\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Claude" | Select-Object Name, Length, Mode | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\flutter","C:\\src\\flutter","C:\\dev\\flutter","$env:USERPROFILE\\flutter","$env:USERPROFILE\\fvm","C:\\tools\\flutter","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\flutter"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Write-Output "---git---"; $git = \(Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($git\) { Write-Output "GIT: $\($git.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "GIT NOT FOUND" }; Write-Output "---editors---"; foreach \($e in @\("code","studio64"\)\) { $c = Get-Command $e -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Write-Output "$e : $\($c.Source\)" } }; Write-Output "---Android Studio dir---"; if \(Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Android Studio"\) { Write-Output "Android Studio installed" } elseif \(Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\Android\\Android Studio"\) { Write-Output "Android Studio installed \(Program Files\)" } else { Write-Output "Android Studio not found in common paths" })

PowerShell(Remove-Item "C:\\Users\\Mancuso\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Claude\\lib\\features\\conversation\\presentation\\widgets\\mic_button.dart" -Force; if \(-not \(Test-Path "C:\\Users\\Mancuso\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Claude\\lib\\features\\conversation\\presentation\\widgets\\mic_button.dart"\)\) { Write-Output "Deleted old conversation mic_button.dart" })
